description_long: This is a classic, elegant armchair with a wooden frame and light tan upholstered seat and backrest. The backrest is oval-shaped, tufted with buttons, and bordered by carved wood detailing, giving it a refined, vintage appearance. The armrests are also wooden, gently curved, and feature small upholstered pads for added comfort. The seat is generously cushioned and upholstered in the same tan fabric as the backrest, bordered by a decorative trim. The legs are straight, fluted, and made of polished wood, adding to the traditional aesthetic. This armchair would be suitable for placement in urban parks, public waiting areas, or upscale sidewalk cafes.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a carved wooden frame, tan tufted upholstery, and cushioned seat and backrest. Features curved wooden armrests and fluted wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the oval, tufted backrest, cushioned seat, and both armrests with upholstered pads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved wooden armrest, padded armrest top, and the profile of the cushioned seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full wooden frame and the back of the upholstered backrest, bordered by decorative trim.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest curve, padded top, and seat profile.
attribute_armrest_design: wooden and curved with padded upholstered tops
attribute_backrest_style: oval, medium-height, tufted and rounded with carved wood border
